### Bryte Data Formatting

Format data from Bryte Excel files for import into Aquarius Samples Database

*Questions: sarah.perry\@water.ca.gov*

------------------------------------------------------------------------

#### Define file paths

Path to import folder

```{r}
# Path to import folder
fp_import <-  'Water Quality/00 - Monthly Run Docs/Lab Reports/2026/01 - January'
```

Path to export folder

```{r}
# Path to export folder
fp_export <- 'Water Quality/00 - Monthly Run Docs/Database Import Data/2026'
```

------------------------------------------------------------------------

#### Run next block *without edits*

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
library(janitor)
library(readxl)
source('00_GlobalFunctions/functions.R')
source('01_WaterQuality/01_routine/aquarius/aquarius_functions/import-functions.R')

# Import Bryte lab files
fp_xlsx <- list.files(path = abs_path_emp(fp_import), pattern = '\\.xlsx$', recursive = TRUE, full.names = TRUE)

# Clean Bryte lab files
df_final <- map_dfr(fp_xlsx, function(fp) {
  format_bryte(fp)
})
```

------------------------------------------------------------------------

#### Data Checks

Check stations

```{r}
# check stations
check_stations(df_final)
```

Check for extra data

```{r}
# check extra data
check_extra_data(df_final)
```

Check all analytes are accounted for

```{r}
# check analytes
check_analytes(df_final, type = 'lab')
```

------------------------------------------------------------------------

#### Export file(s)

```{r}
# Export by month(s)
fp_export <- abs_path_emp(fp_export)

df_list <- split(df_final,
                 list(format(as.POSIXct(df_final$`Observed DateTime`), '%Y-%m')),
                 drop = TRUE)

invisible(lapply(names(df_list), function(name) {
  name_parts <- unlist(strsplit(name, '\\.'))
  year_month <- name_parts[1]

  fp_exp <- paste0(fp_export, '/', year_month,'_Bryte_EMP-DWQ.csv')

  write_csv(df_list[[name]], file = fp_exp, na = '')
}))
```
